name: escapement
description: Escapement: host-neutral agentic workflow layer (beads, OpenSpec, oracle-discipline gates, continuation harness).

plugins.name: escapement
plugins.description: Host-neutral agentic workflow layer with always-on rules injected via a SessionStart hook. Refresh to the latest main with scripts/plugin-update.sh (the static plugin version makes `claude plugin update` a no-op).
